title: teams — published events
description: Every event implements `ShouldDispatchAfterCommit` so listeners never fire against a rolled-back write. Team lifecycle events fan out to notifications + activity + audit; roster-changing events additionally fan out to attendance (Wave 3) for session-roster synchronisation. TeamCoachChanged is the CHILD-SAFETY-SENSITIVE event of the module — when team.min_age < 18 OR max_age < 18, it fires critical-severity audit + notification.

events.name: TeamCreated
events.trigger: TeamRepository finished a successful create. Fires exactly once per (tenant_id, branch_id, slug) tuple.

payload.name: string
payload.team_type: string (squad / class / cohort / group / crew / other)

events.name: TeamUpdated
events.trigger: Any Team scalar field mutated except status (TeamStatusChanged), capacity/capacity_waitlist (TeamCapacityChanged), schedule_pattern (TeamScheduleChanged), coach_id (TeamCoachChanged), registration_opens_at/closes_at (TeamRegistrationOpened / TeamRegistrationClosed). Umbrella event for renames, description edits, colour/logo changes, sort_order tweaks, min_age/max_age edits.

events.name: TeamStatusChanged
events.trigger: Team.status transitioned. Values: active / paused / archived. Fires alongside TeamArchived / TeamRestored on specific transitions.

events.name: TeamCapacityChanged
events.trigger: Team.capacity or Team.capacity_waitlist changed. Distinct event because downstream capacity-gated flows (roster, waitlist, notifications) invalidate their caches on it.

events.name: TeamScheduleChanged
events.trigger: Team.schedule_pattern JSONB mutated. Wave 3 Sports module listens to this to recompute ResourceBooking suggestions.

events.name: TeamCoachChanged
events.trigger: Team.coach_id changed. Fires with `is_minor_only` flag when team.min_age < 18 OR max_age < 18 — CHILD-SAFETY-SENSITIVE. Downstream: notifies old + new coach; when is_minor_only=true, additionally notifies the branch's safeguarding lead + fires critical-severity audit.
consumers: notifications::DispatchTeamCoachChangedNotification (to old + new coach; safeguarding lead when is_minor_only=true)

payload.is_minor_only: boolean (team.min_age < 18 OR team.max_age < 18 — hooks the child-safety notification chain)

events.name: TeamRegistrationOpened
events.trigger: Team.registration_opens_at reached the current moment (auto-flipped by OpenClosePendingRegistrationsJob) OR admin manually set an already-past registration_opens_at.
consumers: notifications::DispatchTeamRegistrationOpeningNotification (to eligible members based on age + gender)

events.name: TeamRegistrationClosed
events.trigger: Team.registration_closes_at reached (auto-flipped) OR admin manually closed early.

events.name: TeamArchived
events.trigger: Team.status transitioned to `archived` OR soft-delete with --cascade-members flag. Terminal.
consumers: teams::CascadeMembersOnTeamArchived (cascades: transitions every active member to inactive with left_reason='team_archived')

events.name: TeamRestored
events.trigger: Archived team's status flipped back to active. Rare — guarded against by TEAM_SUCCESSOR_EXISTS check.

events.name: TeamDeleted
events.trigger: Team hard-deleted (PurgeArchivedTeamsJob past 730-day hold). Cascade FK removes downstream rows.

events.name: TeamMemberJoined
events.trigger: TeamMember row created with status='active'. Also fires as the target of a Trial conversion (fired from within the atomic conversion transaction's afterCommit).

payload.joined_via_trial_id: ULID | null (trial conversion source when applicable)

events.name: TeamMemberLeft
events.trigger: TeamMember.status transitioned to `inactive` OR `graduated`. Fires from voluntary leave OR cascade (team archived).

events.name: TeamMemberRoleChanged
events.trigger: TeamMember.role_on_team mutated.

events.name: TeamMemberStatusChanged
events.trigger: TeamMember.status transitioned but not to `inactive` OR `graduated` (those fire TeamMemberLeft). Non-terminal transitions: injured / suspended / recovery-to-active.

events.name: TeamMemberJerseyChanged
events.trigger: TeamMember.jersey_number mutated. Refused when the new number is already worn by another active member.

events.name: TeamMemberPositionChanged
events.trigger: TeamMember.position mutated.

events.name: TeamMemberSuspended
events.trigger: TeamMember.status transitioned to `suspended` (disciplinary). Fires alongside TeamMemberStatusChanged.

events.name: TeamMemberInjured
events.trigger: TeamMember.status transitioned to `injured` (medical). Fires alongside TeamMemberStatusChanged.

events.name: TrialScheduled
events.trigger: TrialRepository committed a new team_trials row.

events.name: TrialStarted
events.trigger: TeamTrial.status transitioned scheduled → in_progress. Fires when the first session begins (coach marks it started).

events.name: TrialCompleted
events.trigger: TeamTrial.status transitioned in_progress → completed. Fires from coach's explicit action OR from CloseExpiredTrialsJob when ends_at + 24h has passed.

events.name: TrialConvertedToMember
events.trigger: TeamTrial.status transitioned completed → converted. Fires from within the atomic conversion transaction's afterCommit. Companion event TeamMemberJoined fires in the same afterCommit.

events.name: TrialRejected
events.trigger: TeamTrial.status transitioned completed → rejected. decision_notes is required per the observer (anti-discrimination retention).
consumers: notifications::DispatchTrialDecisionNotification (to trialist — rejected; fixed template, never surfaces decision_notes)

events.name: TrialNoShow
events.trigger: TeamTrial.status transitioned to `no_show`. Coach records that the trialist didn't turn up.

events.name: TrialCancelled
events.trigger: TeamTrial.status transitioned to `cancelled` from scheduled or in_progress. Voluntary cancel by trialist OR admin.

events.name: EventTeamRegistered
events.trigger: EventTeamRepository committed a new event_teams row.

events.name: EventTeamWithdrew
events.trigger: event_teams.withdrew_at set from null → now(). Cascades: cancel attendance for members.

events.name: EventTeamCheckedIn
events.trigger: event_teams.checked_in_at set from null → now().

events.name: EventTeamResultRecorded
events.trigger: event_teams.result JSONB written. Refused when the team has withdrew_at set OR participation_type='participant' AND result claims a position (invalid combination — clarified in valid_result_shape rule).
